input.resume_text: Marketing analytics lead for six years owning campaign performance, A/B tests, and stakeholder reporting in Excel and Tableau. input.resume_text: Award-winning condensed-matter physicist with fourteen years of federally funded research, fifty-plus publications, and keynote talks at international conferences.
